user_outcome: A SwornAgent maintainer opens the nightly or manually dispatched live workflow and sees a secret-safe RUN, FAIL, or reasoned SKIP result for every declared OpenAI-compatible endpoint, with Ollama Cloud and the existing OpenAI hosted canary required to run and dialect drift surfaced as a reviewable artifact rather than an automatic repository mutation.
rationale: Live provider behaviour cannot be established by deterministic mocks, but unavailable credentials and local daemons must not disappear from coverage. This slice makes the declared endpoint set and every omission machine-countable, keeps paid and non-deterministic calls outside the pull-request gate, and turns regenerated dialect drift into an explicit failed workflow with review artifacts. It consumes C-01 through C-06 and owns C-07.
in_scope: Replace the single-model live workflow body with a declared endpoint matrix containing every OpenAI-compatible descriptor delivered by S01: existing hosted endpoints plus ollama-cloud, ollama, llamacpp, lmstudio, vllm, and localai. A deterministic test compares workflow provider identifiers with the endpoint descriptor table so either side drifting alone fails.

Keep `.github/workflows/live.yml` callable only by nightly schedule and workflow_dispatch, never pull_request or merge_group. Preserve the existing real-model contract coverage while adding endpoint conformance rows.

Treat the `ollama-cloud` and `openai-completions` endpoint rows as mandatory nightly matrix rows, and preserve the existing `openai` Responses hosted canary as a separate required nightly check. A missing required credential, model identifier, malformed configuration, unreachable endpoint, failed probe, or missing result makes the affected mandatory execution FAIL and the workflow non-zero; mandatory endpoint rows can never become SKIP.

Represent each configured local or optional hosted endpoint as RUN, FAIL, or SKIP with a closed reason-code vocabulary. A row may SKIP only when it is declared optional and its required runner/base URL/model/credential is unavailable; probe rejection of an individual optional feature remains a successful RUN observation, while transport/auth/protocol/schema failure is FAIL.

Provide workflow_dispatch inputs sufficient to configure a real local Ollama endpoint/model and the broader local matrix on an appropriate runner. Default GitHub-hosted execution emits explicit SKIP rows for unavailable local services rather than attempting localhost by assumption. Release proof must preserve either a real local Ollama RUN artifact or its explicit SKIP reason.

Write one endpoint-conformance-matrix-v1 aggregate containing exactly one row per declared endpoint, stable provider ordering, status, closed reason code, safe probe-model identity, and relative dialect-record artifact reference. Reject duplicate, missing, unknown, malformed, or secret-bearing rows and fail when no mandatory row executed.

For every RUN row, invoke the built `sworn endpoint-conformance probe` command and retain its schema-valid raw observation as a per-provider artifact. Aggregate only safe metadata; never include credentials, Authorization values, endpoint userinfo/query strings, request/response bodies, prompts, or model output.

Regenerate the normalized dialect candidate from all successful observations and invoke `sworn endpoint-conformance check`. Equality stays green; drift fails the workflow, uploads the raw observations and candidate normalized table, and leaves the checked-out repository unchanged. The workflow never commits, pushes, comments, or opens a pull request.

Prove enforcement sensitivity by exercising a fixture in which a mandatory row is rewritten to SKIP and the aggregate guard fails, then restoring RUN and observing success. Prove the workflow trigger guard rejects addition of pull_request or merge_group.
out_of_scope: Endpoint declarations, config resolution, credentials, reachability probes, and runtime dispatch are owned by S01 and S02.
Probe semantics, observation generation, dialect-table generation/checking, and runtime request shaping are owned by S03.
Making external providers reliable, provisioning paid credentials, or starting desktop/GPU local services on GitHub-hosted runners is outside repository control.
Using live provider calls as a pull-request merge gate is forbidden.
Automatically editing, committing, pushing, or opening a pull request for dialect drift is forbidden.
Promoting endpoint-level observations into per-model role capability claims remains S04-provider-registry and S05-capability-eligibility in the contract-edge-gates release.

effort_complexity.rationale: The implementation coordinates a multi-provider workflow, mandatory and optional availability semantics, aggregate schema enforcement, artifact flow, drift detection, and non-deterministic external systems. Although the repository touchpoint count is modest, secret mapping and live-run failure modes are emergent and operationally complex.

risks.description: A green workflow silently omits a provider or skips both mandatory canaries.
risks.mitigation: Compare workflow rows with the runtime endpoint table, require exactly one aggregate row per descriptor, prohibit SKIP for mandatory rows, and fail when the executed mandatory count is zero.

risks.description: GitHub-hosted localhost is mistaken for an operator's local service, producing misleading failures or coverage claims.
risks.mitigation: Local rows require explicit runner/base/model configuration and otherwise emit a closed, explicit SKIP reason; release proof distinguishes a real RUN from a skip.

risks.description: Provider credentials or model payloads leak through logs, row metadata, uploaded observations, or failure diagnostics.
risks.mitigation: Pass credentials only through masked environment secrets, reuse S03's secret-safe records, aggregate allowlisted metadata, inject canary values in deterministic tests, and run the public-safe scan.

risks.description: Nightly drift mutates the repository or is normalized away, hiding a provider wire change.
risks.mitigation: Generate to an artifact path, run read-only check, assert the worktree is unchanged, fail on byte drift, and upload both source observations and candidate table for human review.

risks.description: External outages make the PR gate flaky and encourage maintainers to disable the guard.
risks.mitigation: Assert schedule/workflow_dispatch are the only triggers and keep every live job outside ci.yml; live failures remain visible without blocking unrelated pull requests.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN `.github/workflows/live.yml` is mechanically compared with the declared OpenAI-compatible endpoint descriptors THE SYSTEM SHALL contain exactly one row for every descriptor and no unknown or duplicate provider row; adding or removing an endpoint on only one side SHALL fail the test (C-01, C-07, N-04).

WHILE nightly runs THE SYSTEM SHALL make mandatory ollama-cloud/openai-completions rows RUN and pass openai Responses canary; otherwise workflow nonzero, and only those two rows may never SKIP. Sources/models/secrets/defaults are AC-10. Each mandatory row evaluates fixed S01 base, model input, then credential: empty model emits FAIL_REQUIRED_MODEL_MISSING with empty probe_model and no probe; nonempty model failing AC-04 regex emits FAIL_CONFIG_MALFORMED with empty probe_model and no probe; valid model plus missing credential emits FAIL_REQUIRED_CREDENTIAL_MISSING with the exact model and no probe. The openai Responses canary validates openai_responses_model before invoking Go: empty or AC-04-invalid input SHALL NOT run `go test`, SHALL emit schema-valid canary evidence with action missing, empty model, process_exit_code 2, and SHALL fail the workflow. For a valid canary model the exact command is `SWORN_LIVE_TESTS=1 SWORN_LIVE_MODEL=openai/<selected-model> go test -json ./internal/gate -run '^TestLive_SecurityReviewSatisfiesTheContract$' -count=1`. Select only events whose Test exactly `TestLive_SecurityReviewSatisfiesTheContract` and Action pass|fail|skip; require one, ignore package terminals; zero/multiple action=missing. Post-step writes artifact-root openai-responses-canary-v1.json validated by the stdlib liveconformance validator against `internal/liveconformance/schemas/openai-responses-canary-v1.json`, exact schema id `https://swornagent.dev/schemas/openai-responses-canary-v1.json`, with AC-04 encoding/order `$schema`,version,workflow_run_id,workflow_run_attempt,model,test,action,process_exit_code: schema id; integer1; decimal strings; selected full ID for a valid input and empty for an invalid or empty input; exact test; action pass|fail|skip|missing; integer0..255 process status. Upload `openai-responses-canary-<run>-<attempt>`. Success only exit0+pass; other schema-valid evidence fails workflow (C-02,C-04,C-05,C-07,N-04).

WHEN ubuntu-latest coordinator preflights optional row THE SYSTEM SHALL evaluate enabled,runner,base URL,model,provider credential in order and emit one row on first unavailable. SKIP enum exactly OPTIONAL_DISABLED,RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE,BASE_URL_MISSING,MODEL_MISSING,CREDENTIAL_MISSING with SKIP_ prefix. Hosted optional rows have fixed runner ubuntu-latest and pass runner stage without self-hosted API. Enabled local rows require masked secret `SWORN_RUNNER_READ_TOKEN`, a fine-grained PAT or GitHub App installation token with repository Administration read; missing token, HTTP401/403, or any token/API diagnostic is FAIL_RUNNER_PREFLIGHT and token never logged. Local runner grammar `[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,64}`. One monotonic60s budget starts before first API request; polls offsets0,5,...55, no bunching. Each traverses repository `GET /repos/<owner>/<repo>/actions/runners?per_page=100&page=<n>` page1 using Authorization Bearer token, request deadline min(10s,remaining). Each response is UTF-8/no BOM/duplicate-key-free one JSON object with no trailing non-whitespace; root requires nonnegative integer total_count and array runners, with unknown root members ignored. Every runner requires positive integer id, nonempty string name and os, status string exactly online|offline, boolean busy, and labels array; every label requires positive integer id, nonempty string name, and string type exactly read-only|custom; unknown runner/label members are ignored, duplicate runner IDs across pages or duplicate label names within a runner are malformed. Every page repeats the same total_count; Link rel=next, when present, is same origin/path with per_page=100 and page exactly current+1, and its absence terminates. At termination the number of unique runners equals total_count; premature empty page, next after total_count entries, cycle/noncanonical link, budget exhaustion, non200, JSON/type/member/count violation is FAIL_RUNNER_PREFLIGHT. Available iff status online and labels contain byte-exact `self-hosted`, `Linux`, `X64`, and the requested custom runner label; busy ignored. Windows, macOS, non-X64, or missing-label runners never reach a provider probe. No match through deadline SKIP_RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE. No org endpoint. After dispatch and before any local provider network call, the selected self-hosted runner SHALL require `command -v bash timeout chmod` to succeed and `timeout --help` to contain both literal options `--signal` and `--kill-after`; failure emits post-dispatch FAIL_COMMAND with the actual self-hosted execution_environment and runner_label and with endpoint metadata derived from the validated configured base, but makes no provider request. Provider credential required only nonempty descriptor. FAIL enum exactly FAIL_REQUIRED_BASE_URL_MISSING,FAIL_REQUIRED_MODEL_MISSING,FAIL_REQUIRED_CREDENTIAL_MISSING,FAIL_CONFIG_MALFORMED,FAIL_RUNNER_PREFLIGHT,FAIL_TRANSPORT,FAIL_AUTH,FAIL_CREDITS,FAIL_TIMEOUT,FAIL_RATE_LIMIT,FAIL_HTTP_STATUS,FAIL_PROTOCOL,FAIL_RECORD_SCHEMA,FAIL_COMMAND,FAIL_RESULT_MISSING. RUN RUN_PROBE_COMPLETED; schemas reject others (C-03,C-04,C-07,N-04).

WHEN all row envelopes validate THE SYSTEM SHALL write `$RUNNER_TEMP/artifacts/endpoint-conformance/endpoint-conformance-matrix-v1.json` via UTF-8 json.MarshalIndent two spaces, Go HTML escaping, one LF/no BOM. Top order exactly `$schema`,version,workflow_run_id,rows with exact schema URL `https://swornagent.dev/schemas/endpoint-conformance-matrix-v1.json`, JSON integer1, decimal-string github.run_id, array. Row order exactly provider,status,reason,probe_model,record_ref,execution_environment,runner_label,endpoint_scheme,endpoint_host,record_sha256; one per S01 Prefix UTF-8 sorted; status/reason AC-03. probe_model regex `[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:/-]{0,255}`. RUN and post-dispatch FAIL_TRANSPORT,FAIL_AUTH,FAIL_CREDITS,FAIL_TIMEOUT,FAIL_RATE_LIMIT,FAIL_HTTP_STATUS,FAIL_PROTOCOL,FAIL_RECORD_SCHEMA,FAIL_COMMAND,FAIL_RESULT_MISSING use exact configured model; SKIP_CREDENTIAL_MISSING and FAIL_REQUIRED_CREDENTIAL_MISSING also exact; all other SKIP/pre-dispatch FAIL empty; invalid nonempty model FAIL_CONFIG_MALFORMED/empty. environment enum github-hosted,self-hosted,not-run. RUN requires `observations/<provider>.json`, actual environment, hosted runner exact ubuntu-latest or local requested matching `[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,64}`, S03 AC-10 endpoint, lowercase64-hex SHA-256 matching bytes. SKIP/pre-dispatch FAIL empty ref/hash/runner/scheme/host and not-run; post-dispatch FAIL empty ref/hash plus actual environment/runner/endpoint. For RUN only, nonempty refs are slash-only staging-relative and reject leading slash/backslash, dot/dot-dot, filepath.Clean change/escape; every SKIP and FAIL ref is the required empty string and bypasses path validation. S03 host including private IP/DNS deliberately public. Invalid input before matrix; mandatory non-RUN writes then enforcement fails. Excludes credentials,Authorization,userinfo,query,path,bodies,prompts,model output (C-07,N-04).

WHEN a row passes coordinator preflight and is dispatched THE SYSTEM SHALL write mode0600 canonical config at `$RUNNER_TEMP/sworn-live-<run>-<attempt>-<provider>/config.json` exactly `{"providers":{"<provider>":{"base_url":"<resolved-base>"}}}` using S01 validation, set SWORN_CONFIG_PATH, pass model only --model, credential only descriptor secret env, never endpoint override env. Coordinator non-run rows SHALL create neither their `$RUNNER_TEMP/sworn-live-<run>-<attempt>-<provider>` directory nor config.json. After dispatched-row config and tool setup and before endpoint-conformance, every keyless local descriptor SHALL invoke the built `sworn capabilities` with that SWORN_CONFIG_PATH containing only the selected provider. This C-03 check performs GET of normalized `<base>/models` with a two-second total timeout, no retries, and no Authorization header. A nonzero capabilities exit maps FAIL_COMMAND without parsing stdout. Only for exit0, select stdout lines beginning byte-exact `endpoint <provider>/: ` and require exactly one. Exact selected line `endpoint <provider>/: reachable (<N> models)` with N a decimal nonnegative integer continues. Exact `unavailable (timeout)` maps FAIL_TIMEOUT, `unavailable (transport)` maps FAIL_TRANSPORT, `unavailable (http-status-<decimal-code>)` maps FAIL_HTTP_STATUS, and `unavailable (invalid-json|missing-data|data-not-array)` maps FAIL_PROTOCOL. For exit0 only, absent/multiple selected line or any other selected suffix maps FAIL_COMMAND; other capabilities stdout lines are ignored. No endpoint-conformance probe follows a failed reachability check. Hosted or credentialed rows skip this C-03 check. Only a reachable local row continues to endpoint-conformance. Emit row-result-v1.json with AC-04 encoding and member order version,workflow_run_id,workflow_run_attempt,job_key,provider,status,reason,probe_model,execution_environment,runner_label,endpoint_scheme,endpoint_host,started_at,finished_at,observation_ref,observation_sha256; version JSON integer1, IDs decimal strings, rest strings. Coordinator non-run job_key coordinator and empty execution/runner/endpoint/times/ref/hash. Probe job captures started_at immediately before launch and finished_at immediately after return, exact UTC whole-second `2006-01-02T15:04:05Z`, parsed started<=finished; command `timeout --signal=TERM --kill-after=5s 15m sworn endpoint-conformance probe --provider <provider> --model <model> --output observation.json`. Wrapper deadline exits124/137 FAIL_TIMEOUT; other signal or exit64 FAIL_COMMAND; exit2 exact S03 probe-failed classes transport/auth/credits/timeout/rate-limit/protocol/record-schema map respectively FAIL_TRANSPORT/FAIL_AUTH/FAIL_CREDITS/FAIL_TIMEOUT/FAIL_RATE_LIMIT/FAIL_PROTOCOL/FAIL_RECORD_SCHEMA and http-status-* maps FAIL_HTTP_STATUS; other nonzero/diagnostic FAIL_COMMAND; exit0 absent FAIL_RESULT_MISSING; unreadable/noncanonical/schema-invalid FAIL_RECORD_SCHEMA; valid RUN. Delete output on nonzero. Probe job_key `probe-<provider>`; RUN observed_at same layout inclusive started<=observed<=finished zero skew, ref observation.json, matching SHA. Artifact exact `endpoint-row-<run>-<attempt>-<provider>` root contains row-result-v1.json plus RUN-only observation.json, no dirs/extras. Rejected optional observations remain RUN (C-03,C-06,C-07,N-04).

WHEN aggregation runs THE SYSTEM SHALL checkout github.sha at `$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/repo`, stage only `$RUNNER_TEMP/artifacts/endpoint-conformance`, enumerate artifacts with workflow_run.id=github.run_id, select row/canary names embedding current github.run_attempt, ignore earlier-attempt row/canary/aggregate. Current-attempt unknown endpoint-row/canary names INPUT_EXTRA; duplicate exact name INPUT_DUPLICATE. Download merge-multiple=false to `$RUNNER_TEMP/sworn-download/<provider-or-canary>/`, reject preexisting/collision. First-failure order: expected Prefix UTF-8 missing INPUT_MISSING; unknown names lexical INPUT_EXTRA; row or RUN observation unreadable/noncanonical/schema-invalid, including row-result JSON member order differing from AC-05, INPUT_SCHEMA; duplicate envelope provider INPUT_DUPLICATE; row run/attempt/job/name/time/ref/hash mismatch or RUN observation provider/probe_model/endpoint.scheme/endpoint.host/observed_at mismatch INPUT_PROVENANCE; matrix construction; canary validation; mandatory enforcement; baseline; projection; generate; check; cmp; worktree; staging/upload. For every RUN row the observation provider and probe_model equal the row exactly, endpoint scheme/host equal the row and the S01-normalized configured base exactly, observed_at parses in the AC-05 layout and lies inclusively between row started_at and finished_at, and SHA-256 equals both row hashes; any failed equality is INPUT_PROVENANCE after both records have passed INPUT_SCHEMA. Matrix construction builds AC-04 rows from the validated envelopes, canonically encodes, stdlib-schema-validates, and atomically writes the aggregate path; any construction/encoding/schema/write failure deletes any partial matrix, emits aggregation code MATRIX_FAILED with empty provider, empty stdout and exact stderr `live-endpoint-matrix: aggregation failed: MATRIX_FAILED
`, and stops. Canary: absent exact artifact CANARY_MISSING; download/collision, root not exactly sole openai-responses-canary-v1.json, malformed/noncanonical/schema-invalid, run/attempt/model/test mismatch, action missing/fail/skip, or nonzero exit all CANARY_FAILED; never row INPUT codes. Failure file `aggregation-failure-v1.json` AC-04 encoding/order version,workflow_run_id,code,provider: integer1, decimal string, code INPUT_MISSING|INPUT_EXTRA|INPUT_SCHEMA|INPUT_PROVENANCE|INPUT_DUPLICATE|MATRIX_FAILED|CANARY_MISSING|CANARY_FAILED|BASELINE_INVALID|PROJECTION_FAILED|GENERATE_FAILED|CHECK_FAILED|DIALECT_DRIFT|COMPARE_FAILED|WORKTREE_MUTATED|ARTIFACT_IO; provider expected Prefix for row failures else empty. Final trees: structural row or MATRIX_FAILED=failure only/no matrix; canary/baseline/projection/generate failure=matrix,every `provenance/<provider>.json` copy,every RUN `observations/<provider>.json`,available root canary,failure,no candidate; check/cmp/drift/worktree=same plus both candidate files when created; mandatory non-RUN/zero-RUN or equality success=matrix,all provenance,RUN observations,passing canary,no failure/candidate. Validate `$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/repo/internal/model/dialects.json` all S03 AC-08. Projection `candidate/baseline-projection.json` exact S03 profile-table canonical encoding retaining only baseline profiles with current RUN Prefix; no history. Generate repeated `--input $RUNNER_TEMP/artifacts/endpoint-conformance/observations/<provider>.json` Prefix order `--output .../candidate/dialects.json`; check same inputs `--table .../candidate/baseline-projection.json`. RUN absent baseline added drift. check exit1 DIALECT_DRIFT, exit2 CHECK_FAILED; cmp -s 0 equal,1 drift,>1 COMPARE_FAILED. `git -C ... status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all` after checkout and after work both empty or WORKTREE_MUTATED. Staging error ARTIFACT_IO; upload failure nonzero. Upload exact `endpoint-conformance-<run-id>-<attempt>`; no unlisted staged paths, repo mutation,commit,push,comment,PR (C-06,N-04).

IF TestMandatorySkipMutationProof invokes `bash scripts/live-endpoint-matrix.sh --enforce internal/liveconformance/testdata/mandatory-mutation/mandatory-skip.json` THE SYSTEM SHALL produce empty stdout, exact stderr `live-endpoint-matrix: mandatory provider not RUN: ollama-cloud
`, exit1; it SHALL then invoke exactly `bash scripts/live-endpoint-matrix.sh --enforce internal/liveconformance/testdata/mandatory-mutation/mandatory-run.json`, which produces empty stdout, empty stderr, exit0. Artifact root is each matrix file's parent; resolve/hash RUN refs. In mandatory-run.json the ollama-cloud row is exactly provider ollama-cloud,status RUN,reason RUN_PROBE_COMPLETED,probe_model `gpt-oss:120b-cloud`,record_ref `observations/ollama-cloud.json`,execution_environment github-hosted,runner_label ubuntu-latest,endpoint_scheme https,endpoint_host ollama.com,record_sha256 equal to the lowercase SHA-256 of that identical observation file. In mandatory-skip.json that row is exactly provider ollama-cloud,status SKIP,reason SKIP_OPTIONAL_DISABLED and every probe_model,record_ref,execution_environment,runner_label,endpoint_scheme,endpoint_host,record_sha256 string is empty except execution_environment is `not-run`; top-level schema/version/run ID, all other rows, and both observation files are byte-identical. Thus the sole semantic mutation is the ollama-cloud status and its status-dependent canonical fields. proof.md Rule-6 headings record both exact commands/streams/exits plus AC-10 live lines. proof.json validates proof-v1, reachability.type=`cli-run`, and reachability.evidence is one string with ordered lines: `TestMandatorySkipMutationProof`; `mandatory-skip: exit_code=1 stdout=<empty> stderr=live-endpoint-matrix: mandatory provider not RUN: ollama-cloud`; `mandatory-run: exit_code=0 stdout=<empty> stderr=<empty>`; then the six AC-10 live lines. test_results lists both commands passed=true with actual exit_code. Both proofs required (C-07,N-04).

THE SYSTEM SHALL expose the live matrix only through `schedule` and `workflow_dispatch`; adding `pull_request` or `merge_group` SHALL fail the workflow-shape guard, and `.github/workflows/ci.yml` SHALL not invoke live endpoint scripts or set SWORN_LIVE_TESTS (N-04).

IF TestLiveArtifactsAreSecretAndPayloadSafe injects canaries credential=`sk-live-secret-DO-NOT-PRINT`,Authorization=`Bearer auth-DO-NOT-PRINT`,userinfo=`user-DO-NOT-PRINT:pass-DO-NOT-PRINT`,query=`query-DO-NOT-PRINT`,request=`request-DO-NOT-PRINT`,response=`response-DO-NOT-PRINT`,prompt=`prompt-DO-NOT-PRINT`,model-output=`output-DO-NOT-PRINT` THE SYSTEM SHALL capture and concatenate stdout and stderr from every S04-owned executable seam: matrix_config/coordinator parsing, runner-API preflight, self-hosted tooling preflight, built `sworn capabilities`, the OpenAI canary Go command and canary postprocessor, the endpoint-conformance timeout wrapper, row-result validation/writing, artifact aggregation/enforcement, baseline projection, generate/check/cmp, worktree checks, and staging. Third-party checkout/download/upload action internals are outside this offline test boundary; their downloaded/staged files are scanned. The concatenated streams SHALL reject every canary variant, and row execution additionally requires stdout empty/stderr exact `live-endpoint: provider=<Prefix> status=<status> reason=<reason>
`. Walk `$RUNNER_TEMP/artifacts/endpoint-conformance` with filepath.WalkDir: regular files scanned; symlink EvalSymlinks, fail broken/cycle/outside root/directory/nonregular, scan each unique cleaned in-root regular target once. Per canary variants: raw; encoding/json string escape without quotes; `%HH` uppercase for every UTF-8 byte; RFC4648 standard padded base64; whole ASCII lowercase/uppercase; SHA-256/SHA-512 digest lowerhex,upperhex,standard padded base64. Reject all; no URL-safe/raw-base64 claim. Coverage asserts full AC-03 reason set/exact diagnostics and exact induced paths row-result-v1.json,endpoint-conformance-matrix-v1.json,provenance/<provider>.json,observations/<provider>.json,openai-responses-canary-v1.json,aggregation-failure-v1.json,candidate/dialects.json,candidate/baseline-projection.json. record_sha256 only safe observation. `bash scripts/public-safe-scan.sh` and `go test ./internal/liveconformance/... ./internal/model/...` exit0 (C-02,C-05,C-06,C-07,N-04).

WHEN workflow_dispatch is exposed THE SYSTEM SHALL declare exactly four top-level string inputs, required=false, defaults ollama_cloud_model=`gpt-oss:120b-cloud`,openai_completions_model=`gpt-4.1-mini`,openai_responses_model=`gpt-4.1-mini`,matrix_config=`{}`. matrix_config UTF-8/no BOM/duplicate-free one object/no trailing, allowed keys local ollama,llamacpp,lmstudio,vllm,localai and hosted deepseek,groq,mistral,openrouter,xai,cloudflare,github. Omitted disabled. Local value exactly enabled:boolean,runner:string,base_url:string,model:string; hosted enabled:boolean,model:string; no extras. enabled=false requires strings empty. enabled=true permits empty strings classified by AC-03 order; wrong types, unknown/extra, disabled-nonempty, invalid nonempty runner/base/model makes every optional row FAIL_CONFIG_MALFORMED safe empty metadata; mandatory still runs. For a schedule event, where workflow_dispatch inputs are absent, the resolver SHALL substitute ollama_cloud_model=`gpt-oss:120b-cloud`, openai_completions_model=`gpt-4.1-mini`, openai_responses_model=`gpt-4.1-mini`, and matrix_config=`{}` before AC-02/AC-03 evaluation. Hosted fixed ubuntu-latest/S01 base; secrets respectively DEEPSEEK_API_KEY,GROQ_API_KEY,MISTRAL_API_KEY,OPENROUTER_API_KEY,XAI_API_KEY,CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY,GITHUB_TOKEN. Mandatory secrets OLLAMA_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY; local keyless; SWORN_RUNNER_READ_TOKEN only runner API. Generate config AC-05. Hosted rows never use localhost, and omitted/empty local bases never fall back to an S01 localhost default; however an enabled local row with an explicit S01-valid localhost or loopback base is allowed because its selected self-hosted runner owns that network namespace. permissions exactly contents:read,actions:read,models:read; runner admin token separate secret. proof.md and single AC-07 evidence string append exact lines `workflow_url=https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/actions/runs/<run-id>`,`workflow_run_id=<run-id>`,`workflow_run_attempt=<attempt>`,`artifact=endpoint-conformance-<run-id>-<attempt>`,`ollama_status=<RUN|SKIP>`,`ollama_reason=<closed-reason>`. Real RUN acceptance is current-run internal consistency: current artifact metadata/envelope, provider ollama,self-hosted runner,IDs/job/time/hash,S03 endpoint/model, ordinary attempts1/temperature3, plus `TestLiveWorkflowUsesRealProbePath`. That test reads only `.github/workflows/live.yml` and `scripts/live-endpoint-matrix.sh`; requires the script to contain exactly once the line `timeout --signal=TERM --kill-after=5s 15m sworn endpoint-conformance probe --provider "$provider" --model "$model" --output observation.json`; rejects either file containing case-sensitive `testdata`, `fixture`, `mandatory-run.json`, or `mandatory-skip.json`; and rejects any line matching `^[ \t]*(cp|mv|install|rsync)[ \t]+.*(observation\.json|observations/)` or `^[ \t]*(cat|echo|printf|sed|awk)[ \t]+.*(>|tee).*observation\.json`. No cryptographic claim against malicious current job; stale/inconsistent/github-hosted mismatch INPUT_PROVENANCE. SKIP AC-03; missing row fails (C-07,N-04).
